calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235
Petitioner Rosa Maria Marcelino Dejesus (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Humberto Maldonado Marcelino, and with Spanish Interpreter: N. Garcia. Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.

Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

Order granting request dispensing notice to minor's father, granted and singed in open court.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Joshua Homberto Maldonado Marcelino.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
